calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-05-2024 Off Calendar

Notice Of Joint Motion And Joint Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And For Entry Of Consent Judgment
Off Calendar Dec-27-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING R:E PLAINTIFF PAUL WOZNAK's Joint Motion And Joint Motion To Approve Proposition 65
Settlement And For Entry Of Consent Judgment

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Plaintiff Paul Woznak and Defendant Whaleco, Inc. dba Temu's joint Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And For Entry of Consent Judgment is granted. The motion to approve settlement pursuant to Health and Safety Code section 25249.7(f) and Code of Civil Procedure section 664.6 is granted and judgment shall be entered consistent with the Proposition 65 Settlement and the parties' [Proposed] Consent Judgment.

Order signed. Judgment signed.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn; Clerk: S. Kane; Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And For Entry Of Consent Judgment
Off Calendar Dec-04-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF PAUL WOZNAK's Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And For Entry Of Consent Judgment.

Ordered off calendar to permit compliance with Local Rule 2.7(B) (courtesy copies).

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr. , Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/RBU)
